CMV_positive_restenosis.description: Observed frequency distribution of restenosis outcome (restenosed vs. did not restenose) for CMV seropositive (CMV+) patients. Part of a 2×2 contingency table used in the chi-square test of association with CMV_negative_restenosis.

CMV_negative_restenosis.description: Observed frequency distribution of restenosis outcome (restenosed vs. did not restenose) for CMV seronegative (CMV−) patients. Part of a 2×2 contingency table used in the chi-square test of association with CMV_positive_restenosis.
